candidates.why: Primary top-line revenue line; matches target exactly and is the cleanest reported sales label.
Also equals reported top line, but is a more reporting-style total than the cleaner 'Revenue' label.

candidates.row_label: Items that will not be reclassified to statement of income
candidates.why: OCI-related item, not revenue.
Finance income, not operating revenue.
Investment income, not top-line revenue.
Non-operating/financial income, not revenue.

candidates.row_label: Income Available to Com Excl ExtraOrd
candidates.why: Bottom-line earnings measure, not revenue.
Comprehensive income, not revenue.

candidates.row_label: Accrued revenues at the point in time
candidates.why: Balance sheet asset/contract-related item, not the income statement top line.

variables.notes: Using a priority list for revenue labels; later code should take the first available non-missing value.

candidates.why: Best direct production/input-cost line and strongest match for cost of sales among candidates.
Could be an additional direct service/production cost component, but it is mostly empty and may be immaterial.
Potential direct cost component, but appears much smaller and may be a subcomponent rather than the main COGS line.
Inventory asset on balance sheet, not an income statement expense.

candidates.row_label: Net interest cost of pension obligations
candidates.why: Finance/pension item, not COGS.

variables.notes: Selected the clearest primary direct-cost row and avoided possible subcomponents that could create double counting.

candidates.why: Large operating overhead/personnel-type cost bucket; plausible SG&A component when no explicit SG&A line exists.

candidates.row_label: Stock-Based Compensation in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses
candidates.why: Explicitly identified as part of SG&A; valid overhead component.
Generic operating overhead bucket, but broad/ambiguous and may overlap with other expense rows.
Small but valid overhead bucket; fits SG&A concept better than totals.
Balance sheet asset, not SG&A expense.
Balance sheet capitalized asset, not SG&A expense.
Balance sheet receivable, not SG&A expense.

final_choice.row_label: Stock-Based Compensation in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses

variables.notes: No clean standalone SG&A subtotal is present. Chose the best overhead components from the candidate list and avoided totals/subtotals and D&A-related rows. Did not use 'Operating Expenses' because it is too broad and risks overlap/double counting with the chosen components.

candidates.row_label: Amortization excluding Goodwill in Research & Development Expenses
candidates.why: R&D-related wording exists, but this is amortization within R&D rather than a dedicated current-period R&D expense line.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Capitalized Research & Development Expenses - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental amortization disclosure, not core R&D expense.
Balance sheet asset, not R&D expense.
Balance sheet capitalized development asset, not expense.

candidates.row_label: Research & Development Costs - Accumulated Amortization & Impairment
candidates.why: Balance sheet accumulated amortization/impairment, not current R&D expense.

variables.notes: No dedicated income-statement R&D expense row is visible. The only R&D-labelled income statement rows are amortization/supplemental disclosures, which should not be mapped as XRD.

candidates.why: Broad finance-cost total that likely includes FX and impairments; less preferred than granular recurring interest rows.
Primary recurring interest expense line; best match for XINT.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Recurring financing cost component that should be included with interest expense.

candidates.row_label: Net interest cost of pension obligations
candidates.why: Would be recurring finance cost if populated, but appears absent here.
Attribution of earnings, not interest expense.
Attribution of earnings, not interest expense.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental duplicate of lease-interest row; avoid double counting.
Balance sheet label, not income statement finance expense.
Liability balance, not expense.
Liability balance, not expense.
Equity/NCI balance, not interest expense.
Equity/NCI balance, not interest expense.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities

variables.notes: Used the most granular recurring interest-cost components and excluded the broader 'Finance costs' total to avoid mixing in FX losses, impairments, and other non-interest finance items.

candidates.why: Income statement attribution line, not a balance sheet equity balance.
Comprehensive income attribution line, not a balance sheet equity balance.
Not a book equity balance line.

candidates.row_label: Capital and reserves attributable to owners of the company
candidates.why: Best owner/parent equity line and excludes non-controlling interests.
Would include non-controlling interests, so less preferred when owner equity is available.

final_choice.row_label: Capital and reserves attributable to owners of the company

variables.notes: Preferred owner-attributable equity to avoid double counting with MIB.

candidates.why: Income statement attribution line, not the balance sheet minority equity balance.
Income statement attribution line, not the balance sheet minority equity balance.
Direct balance sheet NCI/minority interest line; best match.
Also a direct balance sheet NCI line and useful as fallback if labels vary by year.

variables.notes: Using a priority list for the balance-sheet NCI label; both rows represent the same concept and support label changes over time.
